name: pi-mcp-bridge
description: Collection bridge for external MCP servers into pi. Unity MCP (CoplayDev unity-mcp) runs locally via uvx stdio for Unity editor/scene automation; tools register as coplaydev_unity__*. Higgsfield MCP connects over HTTP to https://higgsfield.ai/mcp for AI image/video generation, authenticated with HIGGSFIELD_TOKEN; tools register as higgsfield__*.
